michaelryan.struct.queues

Class HeapPriorityQueue.Node

  • java.lang.Object
    • michaelryan.struct.queues.HeapPriorityQueue.Node
  • Enclosing class:
    HeapPriorityQueue<T>

    private class HeapPriorityQueue.Node
extends Object
    A single item in the queue. Stores the data itself and the node's priority.
